title: Laws X: The Existence of the Gods
description: Plato's last word on theology: the soul is prior to the body, and the orderly motion of the heavens proves that gods exist.
introduction: Plato's last word on theology: the soul is prior to the body, and the orderly motion of the heavens proves that gods exist.

translation.text: The soul is the source of all motion. What moves itself is immortal and divine.
